---
title: "Skills"
---

::: {.page-title}
Technical and analytical skills developed through MSc coursework, applied projects, and independent portfolio work.
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-card}
### Python

Data cleaning, analysis, visualisation, model building, and notebook-based experimentation using pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib, seaborn, and transformers.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### SQL

Querying, joining, filtering, and structuring relational data for business analytics workflows.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Machine Learning

Classification, regression, clustering, model evaluation, confusion matrices, F1 score, and practical experimentation.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### NLP

Text classification, transformer models, BERT, prompt-based classification, and generative AI comparison.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Power BI

Dashboard thinking, KPI communication, stakeholder reporting, and visual analytics.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Excel

Data preparation, spreadsheet modelling, formulas, pivot tables, and business-facing analysis.
:::
:::
:::
